response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-leading C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of cloud platform leadership or distributed systems ownership at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across multiple languages and domains.
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and community projects.
Demonstrated ability to own ambiguous projects and deliver production systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent tooling).
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement.
No demonstrated leadership or architecture role in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale.
Lacks measurable experience in testing/launching large-scale software products or managing infrastructure timelines.
